file_insights.purpose: Update project build status and progress tracking
key_changes: Current phase changed from 'Orders Module Models' to 'Subscriptions Module Models'

file_insights.purpose: Initialize migrations package for orders module
key_changes: Empty init file created to make migrations directory a Python package

file_insights.purpose: Generate initial database migrations for subscriptions module
key_changes: Created 6 models: Feature, Plan, Subscription, Invoice, PlanFeature, OrganizationUsage
Feature model with code, name, description, type (BOOLEAN/LIMIT/USAGE), category fields
Plan model with pricing (monthly/yearly), tier levels (FREE/STARTER/GROWTH/PROFESSIONAL/ENTERPRISE), feature flags, limits
Subscription model with status (TRIALING/ACTIVE/PAST_DUE/CANCELLED/EXPIRED/SUSPENDED), billing period, payment method, pricing
Invoice model for billing records with status tracking
PlanFeature junction table for many-to-many relationships
Multiple database indexes for query optimization
Comprehensive help_text and verbose_name for all fields
JSON fields for flexible metadata storage

file_insights.purpose: Initialize migrations package for subscriptions module
key_changes: Empty init file created to make migrations directory a Python package

patterns_discovered.description: All models include created_at, updated_at, deleted_at fields with soft-delete support
patterns_discovered.significance: Enables audit trails and safe record deletion without data loss

patterns_discovered.description: All models use UUID instead of auto-incrementing integers
patterns_discovered.significance: Provides distributed-system-friendly identifiers and enhances privacy

patterns_discovered.description: Every field includes help_text and verbose_name for admin interface clarity
patterns_discovered.significance: Improves developer experience and admin usability

patterns_discovered.description: Indexes created on frequently-queried fields (status, tier, slug, deleted_at, active status)
patterns_discovered.significance: Optimizes query performance for common filtering operations

patterns_discovered.description: JSONField used for limits, feature_flags, metadata, and payment_details
patterns_discovered.significance: Provides flexibility for evolving data structures without migrations

patterns_discovered.description: Subscription statuses include TRIALING, ACTIVE, PAST_DUE, CANCELLED, EXPIRED, SUSPENDED
patterns_discovered.significance: Enables nuanced billing lifecycle management and recovery workflows

patterns_discovered.description: Support for both MONTHLY and YEARLY billing with separate pricing fields
patterns_discovered.significance: Accommodates different customer preferences and payment cycles

patterns_discovered.description: Combination of Feature model, Plan model features, and JSONField flags
patterns_discovered.significance: Supports both pre-defined and custom feature configurations

patterns_discovered.description: Fields for external_subscription_id, external_customer_id, and payment_details
patterns_discovered.significance: Enables integration with payment processors like Iyzico

patterns_discovered.description: sort_order fields in both Plan and Feature models with highlight_text
patterns_discovered.significance: Supports flexible UI ordering and promotional highlighting

gotchas_discovered.description: Migration includes fields for Iyzico integration but actual payment logic not created
gotchas_discovered.impact: Migration is ready but implementation of payment processing gateway must follow
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Clear field definitions provide integration points for payment service implementation

gotchas_discovered.description: Six different subscription statuses (TRIALING, ACTIVE, PAST_DUE, CANCELLED, EXPIRED, SUSPENDED) require careful state machine logic
gotchas_discovered.impact: Application code must implement proper status transition rules to prevent invalid states
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Well-defined status choices in migration enable validation layer

gotchas_discovered.description: deleted_at field enables soft-deletes but CASCADE delete on organization FK may cause data inconsistency
gotchas_discovered.impact: Deleting organization will hard-delete subscriptions even if soft-delete intended
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Consider overriding delete() method or implementing custom deletion logic

gotchas_discovered.description: trial_ends_at field allows null values creating two subscription paths
gotchas_discovered.impact: Application logic must correctly handle both trial and direct subscription flows
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Field definition is clear but requires careful implementation

gotchas_discovered.description: Currency field exists in both Plan and Subscription models
gotchas_discovered.impact: Could lead to currency mismatch between plan and subscription if not kept synchronized
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Consider adding validation or constraint to ensure consistency

gotchas_discovered.description: cancel_at_period_end flag requires background job implementation
gotchas_discovered.impact: Subscription won't automatically transition to CANCELLED status without scheduler
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Migration is ready but requires Celery/APScheduler task to enforce

gotchas_discovered.issue: JSON field limits and features structure
gotchas_discovered.description: Plan.limits and Plan.feature_flags are schemaless JSON without validation
gotchas_discovered.impact: Invalid limit values could be stored causing runtime errors
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Should implement JSONSchema validation or model validators

approach_outcome.summary: Successfully generated and applied comprehensive Django migrations for the subscriptions module
accomplishments: Created 6 interconnected models covering complete subscription lifecycle
Implemented proper database indexing for performance optimization
Added extensive field documentation for admin interface usability
Enabled audit trail support through timestamp fields
Provided flexible data storage through JSONField for metadata
Created migration files that can be applied to database
Established foreign key relationships with core.organization model
approach_outcome.technical_quality: HIGH - Well-structured migrations with comprehensive field definitions, strategic indexing, and soft-delete support
approach_outcome.progress_tracking: Project advanced from subtask 28 to subtask 36 (8 tasks completed), session 29 to session 39
approach_outcome.readiness: Migrations are ready to apply; subsequent tasks should implement business logic, validators, and payment processor integration

recommendations.recommendation: Implement subscription service layer with status transition logic
recommendations.rationale: Migration defines statuses but business logic to transition between them is critical for billing operations

recommendations.recommendation: Add validators for Plan.limits and Plan.feature_flags JSONField
recommendations.rationale: Schemaless JSON fields could accept invalid data; JSONSchema or model validators needed

recommendations.recommendation: Add index on (organization_id, status) for common subscription queries
recommendations.rationale: Commonly filtered by organization and status; composite index would improve query performance

recommendations.recommendation: Implement background job scheduler for cancel_at_period_end subscriptions
recommendations.rationale: Migration supports deferred cancellation but requires Celery/APScheduler task to enforce

recommendations.recommendation: Create payment provider integration layer before implementing invoice functionality
recommendations.rationale: External payment IDs and metadata fields depend on payment processor integration

recommendations.recommendation: Implement currency synchronization validation between Plan and Subscription
recommendations.rationale: Duplication of currency field across models could create inconsistencies

recommendations.recommendation: Override delete() method or implement custom DeletionManager for soft-deletes
recommendations.rationale: CASCADE delete on organization FK may conflict with intended soft-delete behavior

recommendations.recommendation: Create admin interface documentation for billing_period and payment_method choices
recommendations.rationale: Choice fields have business implications that admin users need to understand
